message:
fix(runtime): resize_coalescer property tests skip same-size resize

Two property tests (bounded_latency_maintained, no_size_corruption)
failed when proptest generated w=80, h=24 — the same as the initial
coalescer size. This hit the "skip_same_size" early return path,
leaving no pending resize for tick_at to apply.

Fix: initialize coalescer with (0,0) so no dimension in the test
range (1..500) matches the initial size.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
